description_long: This is a sports drink bottle with a contoured, grippy body and a wide, ribbed midsection for easy handling. The bottle features a light orange screw cap with a nozzle, commonly used for quick hydration during physical activities. The upper section of the bottle is wrapped with a printed label that includes nutritional information, branding, and a prominent Gatorade logo. The main body of the bottle is a semi-opaque white plastic, while the cap is a solid orange color. The bottle's ergonomic design and textured surface make it suitable for use in active, urban environments such as parks or sports fields. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation, and the bottle appears to be empty or its contents are not visible.
description: A contoured, semi-opaque white sports drink bottle with a ribbed body, orange screw cap, and Gatorade branding. The bottle is designed for easy grip and quick hydration.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the nutritional label and the ribbed, grippy body with the orange cap.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the Gatorade logo, branding, and the orange nozzle cap.
description_view_2: Side-rear view highlighting the barcode, part of the logo, and the contoured bottle shape.
description_view_3: Side-front view showing the Gatorade logo, branding, and part of the nutritional label.
attribute_label_or_branding: Gatorade logo and branding in gray and orange, nutritional information, and barcode on a printed label wrapped around the upper section.
